name: Green Curry Paste
recipeIngredient: 12 Green chilies (such as serranos); halved, seeds and stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the coriander and cumin seeds for about 2 minutes in a dry skillet until fragrant.
2. Allow the seeds to cool, then grind them to a fine powder using a spice mill.
3. In a food processor or blender, combine the roasted ground spices with all remaining ingredients.
4. Puree until a smooth paste is formed.
5. Transfer the paste into an airtight container and refrigerate for up to one month.
6. This curry paste can be added to any other curry preparation; just use 1 teaspoon to enhance flavor, zesty notes, and pungency.
